programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Nelon family vs. Ham family.

programme.title: General Hospital
programme.desc: Lulu is outraged; Michael unveils his plan; Liz puts Willow on the spot; Josslyn comes into some tantalizing information; Curtis opens up to Laura.

programme.title: Tribunal Justice
programme.sub-title: Welcome Back to the United States
programme.desc: After residing in Mexico during the pandemic, a homeowner returns to the U.S. looking to buy out his tenants' lease and live in his own home again; despite a solid offer, he is met with a $10K lawsuit for moving fees and a security deposit.

programme.title: Tribunal Justice
programme.desc: A veteran makes several rookie mistakes when he purchases his first home and is sued for thousands by tenants that came with the property; a questionable inspection does little to back up his claims of property damage.

programme.title: Judy Justice
programme.desc: A man allegedly sells his ex-girlfriend's car without her permission; a woman sues her landlord.

programme.title: Judy Justice
programme.sub-title: Teen Drives Truck Into Tree; Hair Extension/Defamation Fight
programme.desc: Parents fight over liability when unlicensed teens get behind the wheel of a truck and have an accident; a salon owner goes after a former client for payment of hair extensions; she is met with a countersuit for alleged online defamation.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When an important trial is jeopardized after Sarah's testimony is challenged by a former rival in court, it's up to Charlie, Rex and the rest of the Major Crimes team to uncover new evidence to save the case before time runs out.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When the co-owner of a successful board game company is found dead of a snake bite, the team has to not only catch the killer, but also the deadly venomous snake that is still on the loose.

programme.title: Tribunal Justice
programme.desc: A woman lets her friend of 15 years stay at her place, but must take him to court to collect any rent; she claims he broke house rules and disrespected her boyfriend's sobriety when he brought alcohol into her home.

programme.title: Judy Justice
programme.desc: A mother claims to be entitled to her son's stimulus check after alleging that she was supporting him; he says he was living with his girlfriend at the time.
